# graph-canvas

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Generic dagre+xyflow graph canvas primitive: read-only pan/zoom/fit viewer with HTML/Tailwind nodes and solid/dashed directed edges, behind a domain-agnostic node/edge API.
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports: Types: `GraphCanvasEdge`, `GraphCanvasNode`, `GraphCanvasProps`; Values: `GraphCanvas`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `apps/studio/graph`
